# Atomadic

> 119+ formally verified AI safety API endpoints across 30 product families for autonomous agents.

## API Base URL
https://atomadic.tech

## MCP Server
https://atomadic.tech/mcp

## OpenAPI Spec
https://atomadic.tech/openapi.json

## A2A Agent Card
https://atomadic.tech/.well-known/agent.json

## Free Endpoints (no auth required)
- GET /health — Service health
- GET /status — Status page
- GET /v1/rng/quantum — Quantum RNG with cryptographic proof
- GET /v1/rng/verify — Verify an RNG proof
- GET /v1/rng/entropy — Raw entropy
- GET /v1/oracle/entropy — Entropy epoch oracle
- GET /v1/oracle/entropy/history — Epoch history
- GET /v1/agents/topology — Live agent topology
- GET /v1/swarm/inbox — Poll swarm messages
- GET /v1/swarm/topology — Swarm topology view
- GET /v1/swarm/peers — List swarm peers
- GET /v1/inference/models — Available inference models
- GET /v1/compress/stats — Compression stats
- GET /v1/shield/status — Shield status
- GET /v1/threat/history — Threat history
- POST /v1/agents/register — Register agent (A2A compatible)
- GET /.well-known/agent.json — A2A agent card
- GET /.well-known/mcp.json — MCP manifest

## Paid Endpoints — Oracle (x402 or API key)
- POST /v1/oracle/hallucination — Hallucination upper bound ($0.002)
- POST /v1/oracle/bias — Bias detection
- POST /v1/oracle/toxicity — Toxicity scoring
- POST /v1/oracle/safety — Safety gate
- POST /v1/oracle/risk — Risk assessment
- POST /v1/oracle/compliance — Compliance oracle
- POST /v1/oracle/trust — Trust phase oracle
- POST /v1/oracle/trust-phase — Trust phase with depth

## Paid Endpoints — RNG
- POST /v1/rng/seeded — Seeded RNG ($0.001)
- POST /v1/rng/cryptographic — CSPRNG ($0.005)
- POST /v1/rng/batch — Batch RNG
- POST /v1/rng/stream — Streaming RNG

## Paid Endpoints — RatchetGate
- POST /v1/ratchet/register — Session security ($0.002)
- POST /v1/ratchet/advance — Advance ratchet ($0.002)
- POST /v1/ratchet/probe — Probe session
- POST /v1/ratchet/status — Session status
- POST /v1/ratchet/revoke — Revoke session
- POST /v1/ratchet/verify — Verify session
- POST /v1/ratchet/list — List sessions

## Paid Endpoints — Identity
- POST /v1/identity/verify — Sybil-resistant identity ($0.020)
- POST /v1/identity/register — Register identity
- POST /v1/identity/lookup — Lookup identity
- POST /v1/identity/revoke — Revoke identity
- POST /v1/identity/challenge — Challenge identity

## Paid Endpoints — Threat
- POST /v1/threat/score — Multi-vector threat score ($0.003)
- POST /v1/threat/analyze — Deep threat analysis
- POST /v1/threat/report — Report threat
- POST /v1/threat/block — Block agent

## Paid Endpoints — Compliance
- POST /v1/compliance/check — GDPR/CCPA check ($0.005)
- POST /v1/compliance/audit — Compliance audit
- POST /v1/compliance/report — Compliance report
- POST /v1/compliance/policy — Policy check
- POST /v1/compliance/scan — Compliance scan

## Paid Endpoints — Agents
- POST /v1/agents/plan — Goal planner ($0.015)
- POST /v1/agents/intent-classify — Intent classification ($0.005)
- POST /v1/agents/reputation — A2A trust score ($0.010)
- POST /v1/agents/reputation/history — Reputation history
- POST /v1/agents/reputation/score — Score query
- POST /v1/agents/status — Agent status
- POST /v1/agents/update — Update agent
- POST /v1/agents/deregister — Deregister agent
- POST /v1/agents/capabilities — Query capabilities
- POST /v1/agents/search — Search agents
- POST /v1/agents/health — Agent health check
- POST /v1/agents/discover — Discover agents
- POST /v1/agents/message — Send message
- POST /v1/agents/negotiate — Negotiate terms
- POST /v1/agents/delegate — Delegate task
- POST /v1/agents/sla — SLA check
- POST /v1/agents/sla/create — Create SLA
- POST /v1/agents/sla/verify — Verify SLA
- POST /v1/agents/sla/list — List SLAs
- POST /v1/agents/escrow — Escrow check
- POST /v1/agents/escrow/create — Create escrow
- POST /v1/agents/escrow/release — Release escrow
- POST /v1/agents/escrow/dispute — Dispute escrow
- POST /v1/agents/escrow/status — Escrow status

## Paid Endpoints — Inference
- POST /v1/inference — Chat completions + guard ($0.015)
- POST /v1/inference/stream — Streaming inference ($0.025)
- POST /v1/inference/embeddings — Embeddings
- POST /v1/inference/classify — Text classification

## Paid Endpoints — Text Processing
- POST /v1/text/summarize — Summarization ($0.010)
- POST /v1/text/sentiment — Sentiment analysis ($0.005)
- POST /v1/text/classify — Classification
- POST /v1/text/embed — Embeddings
- POST /v1/text/translate — Translation
- POST /v1/text/extract — Entity extraction
- POST /v1/text/ner — Named entity recognition
- POST /v1/text/tokenize — Tokenization
- POST /v1/text/detect-language — Language detection
- POST /v1/text/keywords — Keyword extraction
- POST /v1/text/similarity — Semantic similarity
- POST /v1/text/rewrite — Text rewriting

## Paid Endpoints — Shield / Delegation / UCAN / Keys / Audit / Credits
- POST /v1/shield/session — Shield session
- POST /v1/shield/post-quantum — Post-quantum security
- POST /v1/shield/verify — Verify shield
- POST /v1/shield/rotate — Rotate shield
- POST /v1/delegate/verify — Verify delegation
- POST /v1/delegate/chain — Delegation chain
- POST /v1/delegate/revoke — Revoke delegation
- POST /v1/delegate/list — List delegations
- POST /v1/delegate/depth — Check depth
- POST /v1/ucan/create — Create UCAN
- POST /v1/ucan/verify — Verify UCAN
- POST /v1/ucan/revoke — Revoke UCAN
- POST /v1/ucan/delegate — Delegate via UCAN
- POST /v1/key/generate — Generate key
- POST /v1/key/rotate — Rotate key
- POST /v1/key/revoke — Revoke key
- POST /v1/credits/balance — Check balance
- POST /v1/credits/purchase — Purchase credits
- POST /v1/credits/history — Credit history
- POST /v1/credits/usage — Usage report
- POST /v1/audit/log — Log event
- POST /v1/audit/trail — Audit trail
- POST /v1/audit/export — Export audit log
- POST /v1/compress — Compress data
- POST /v1/compress/batch — Batch compress
- POST /v1/compress/decompress — Decompress
- POST /v1/compress/verify — Verify compression
- POST /v1/swarm/relay — Relay message
- POST /v1/swarm/broadcast — Broadcast to swarm
- POST /v1/swarm/join — Join swarm
- POST /v1/swarm/leave — Leave swarm

## Authentication
- API Key: Header `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY` — Get at /pay
- x402: Autonomous USDC payments on Base L2 / Polygon / Solana

## Quick Test
curl https://atomadic.tech/v1/rng/quantum

## Full Documentation
- llms-full.txt (in this repo)
- docs/QUICK_START.md
- docs/PRICING.md
- examples/ (curl, TypeScript, Python, MCP, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen)

## Contact
atomadic@proton.me
